ops.title: cc-notes pack: verbose-comment → ccn redirect hook
ops.description: New plugin/hooks/comments.py in ~/Code/cc-notes: VerboseCommentIntroduced (any too-long touched run, doc or inline) built on captain_hook.ast_grep.touched_comment_runs; only_if adds CcNotesAvailable; nudge with explicit max_fires=None so it pairs with the general-pack block every time (requires the dispatch warns-survive-deny change shipped in the captain-hook task). Message routes durable rationale to `cc-notes note add` / `cc-notes doc add --when`, no secrets. Plugin 0.10.0→0.11.0 (cache is version-keyed). Dependency floor on the new captain-hook release must land with the in-flight attach-only migration — coordinate with task 215f9ce, don't duplicate. Never import the general pack module (module-level registrations execute).

ops.text: plugin/hooks/comments.py nudge (max_fires=None) with inline tests green via capt-hook --hooks plugin/hooks test
capt-hook pack lint on plugin/ adds no new failure class
plugin.json bumped to 0.11.0, pushed, CI green
live repro: scratch-repo deny contains both the Verbose-comment block text and the cc-notes redirect; rustdoc warn-only; density warn; untouched legacy run allowed
